note: Config for the Meeting Prep tool. National developments are curated + verified; refresh dates as they change. Trusts seeded with verified context only.

nationalKeyInfo.title: Value-based procurement is the national standard
nationalKeyInfo.detail: The DHSC / NHS England / NHS Supply Chain national standard scores medtech tenders on wider value (social value, efficiency, patient & staff, supply chain, purpose) weighted ≥60%, with whole-life cost capped at 40%. Procurement must save money AND show value.
nationalKeyInfo.use: Frame every case as value, not price. Build it in the Value Case Calculator and hand procurement a figure they can take to finance.

nationalKeyInfo.title: New NHS Supply Chain online catalogue
nationalKeyInfo.detail: A new online catalogue and search rolled out from late 2025 (search by NPC, MPC, supplier, brand, GTIN or free text).
nationalKeyInfo.use: A genuine, non-salesy opener: “how are you finding the new catalogue?”

nationalKeyInfo.title: New Hospital Programme reset
nationalKeyInfo.detail: Reset in Jan 2025 into delivery Waves 0–3; costed ~£56bn (NAO, Jan 2026). RAAC-affected trusts are prioritised in Wave 1.
nationalKeyInfo.use: If your trust has a new build, get in at design stage — equipment is specified 12–24 months before it opens.

nationalKeyInfo.title: Carbon scored at tender (Evergreen)
nationalKeyInfo.detail: NHS Supply Chain requires Evergreen Level 1 (a Carbon Reduction Plan + net-zero commitment) at tender close from 6 April 2026.
nationalKeyInfo.use: Have your carbon and sustainability position ready — it is scored, not optional.

trusts.name: Frimley Health NHS Foundation Trust
trusts.context: Frimley Park Hospital is RAAC-affected and is a ~£2bn Wave 1 New Hospital Programme rebuild; a new site (Pine Ridge) was proposed in June 2026, with construction ~2028–29 and outpatient/diagnostics staying on the current site. A trust under heavy capital and cost pressure — exactly where a save-and-improve story lands.
trusts.news: New-hospital site selection (June 2026); RAAC rebuild confirmed in NHP Wave 1.

contacts.note: Look up their recent public LinkedIn activity before the meeting — what they’re posting about tells you their current priorities.
Your clinical champion for the value case — they carry the case to procurement.
